key.name: enabled
key.description: When true, HomeSpike replaces the default Lomiri home behavior — BFB minimises apps to reveal HomeSpike, the spread gets a home button, the drawer offers "Add to HomeSpike", and the bottom dock can be enabled. When false, Lomiri behaves as upstream and HomeSpike's UI is hidden (the override files stay installed but their HomeSpike-specific code paths short-circuit).

key.name: pending-adds
key.description: Reactive cross-component inbox. The patched Drawer appends an appId here when the user picks "Add to HomeSpike"; HomeSpike places it on the grid and clears the key. Newline-separated. Replaces the old polled file inbox (no timer, no file:// XHR).
